services.name: Hull Cleaning
services.shortDescription: Professional robotic hull cleaning that removes fouling without damaging your antifouling paint.
services.longDescription: Using our Keelcrab Pro underwater robot, we clean your hull in the water — no lift-out needed. Certified nylon brushes remove barnacles, algae, and biofilm while preserving your antifouling coating. Every clean includes HD video documentation and a digital report.

steps.title: Book Your Clean
steps.description: Tell us your boat length, location, and preferred date. We'll confirm within 24 hours.

steps.title: We Clean Your Hull
steps.description: Our Keelcrab Pro robot attaches to your hull and cleans up to 7m² per minute. All debris is captured in our eco-compliant filter bag.

steps.title: Get Your Report
steps.description: Receive HD video footage and a digital before/after report within 24 hours of your clean.

benefits.title: Preserves Antifouling
benefits.description: A.N.C.C.P. certified brushes clean without damaging your paint — extending its useful life.

benefits.title: Eco-Compliant
benefits.description: All removed debris is captured in the Keelcrab Bag. Nothing enters the water.

benefits.title: No Lift-Out Required
benefits.description: Save £500+ on marina hoist fees. We clean while your boat stays in the water.

benefits.title: HD Video Documentation
benefits.description: See exactly what we see — HD footage of your entire hull, shared with you digitally.

services.name: Hull Inspection
services.shortDescription: Detailed underwater visual condition report using HD camera technology.
services.longDescription: Our Keelcrab Pro's HD camera system provides a comprehensive visual inspection of your hull below the waterline. You receive a full video recording and a written condition report — giving you a clear picture of your hull's health without the cost of a lift-out.

steps.title: Book Your Inspection
steps.description: Tell us your boat length, location, and what you'd like us to focus on.

steps.title: We Inspect Your Hull
steps.description: Our robot scans your entire hull with HD cameras, documenting the waterline, antifoul condition, intakes, and any areas of concern.

steps.title: Get Your Report
steps.description: Receive a visual condition report (PDF + video link) with observations and recommendations.

benefits.title: See Below the Waterline
benefits.description: HD video reveals what's happening to your hull — fouling levels, antifoul condition, and potential issues.

benefits.title: Pre-Season Peace of Mind
benefits.description: Check your hull's condition before the sailing season without a costly lift-out.

benefits.title: Pre-Purchase Confidence
benefits.description: Considering buying a boat? A visual hull inspection reveals the condition below the waterline before you commit.

benefits.title: Digital Documentation
benefits.description: Your report includes timestamped video and written observations — useful for insurance and maintenance records.

services.disclaimer: This is a visual condition report delivered by robotic technology. It is not a qualified marine survey and does not replace the opinion of a certified marine surveyor.

quadSafe.description: Precision nylon brushes preserve your antifouling coating — certified to clean without damage.
Eco-compliant debris capture means nothing enters the water. Marina approved.
No lift-out needed. Save £500+ on marina hoist fees and keep your boat in the water.
HD visual reports give you early warning on hull integrity, intakes, and potential issues.
